creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

The URLs are invalid:
> $ distilator 
> 301 [WWW]	http://bitbucket.org/klepa/simplexml -> https://bitbucket.org/klepa/simplexml
> 301 [DISTFILE]	http://bitbucket.org/klepa/simplexml/get/1.0.1.tar.gz -> https://bitbucket.org/klepa/simplexml/get/1.0.1.tar.gz
but the redirect URLs are dead.

The project seems to have migrated to https://bitbucket.org/kberridge/simplexml
Please update it accordingly.

Thanks,
Yuri
